mission.title: notary-project: Define experience for notation sign command
mission.description: Define experience for notation sign command. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current notary-project deployment
steps.description:
Verify your notary-project version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project
helm list -n notary-project 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working notary-project installation.

steps.title: Review notary-project configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant notary-project configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project
kubectl get configmap -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=notary-project
```
Things to consider
* Should we use a default key or need the user to explicitly specify the key
* Does signing automatically push signature to repo? Which repo? 
* How does one filter out private signatures from being automatically pushed to public

steps.title: Apply the fix for Define experience for notation sign command
steps.description:
These are the target commands, lifting the [prototype-2](https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/tree/prototype-2) efforts to the nearly RC state of the [artifacts-spec](https://github.com/oras-project/artifacts-spec/)

Note: these commands don't work, **_yet_**. This is the target for what will work.
Please iterate any feedback here and we can incorporate into the work to support these commands.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project
kubectl get events -n notary-project --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Define experience for notation sign command" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
These are the target commands, lifting the [prototype-2](https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/tree/prototype-2) efforts to the nearly RC state of the [artifacts-spec](https://github.com/oras-project/artifacts-spec/)

Note: these commands don't work, **_yet_**. This is the target for what will work.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with notary-project installed or the issue environment reproducible.
